word: H2576 - חַמֹּת דֹּאר - Chammôth Dôʼr - kham-moth' dore - Hamath-Dor

sections.paragraph:
Original: חמּת דּאר

Transliteration: chammôth dô'r

Phonetic: kham-moth' dore

BDB Definition:

Hamath-Dor = "hot springs of Dor"
  1. a Levitical city in Naphtali

Origin: from the pl. of H2535 and H1756

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
